text:
is a fictional band formed by students of Tokyo-3 Middle School. It was introduced in the games Neon Genesis Evangelion and Neon Genesis Evangelion: Second Impression.

Songs

"Kiseki no Senshi Evangelion"
"Kimi ga, Kimi ni Umareta Wake"

Known Members

Shinji Ikari: Keys
Tōji Suzuhara: Guitar
Kensuke Aida: Drums, Lyricist, Composer
Hikari Horaki: Vocals
Mayumi Yamagishi: Vocals
Shigeru Aoba: Guitar Adviser
